experience.title: Resident Advisor

Increase students' knowledge of policies and procedures of Residential Life and increase students involvement in University, Residential Life committees and activities/events. summary: A Compassionate Security Aide that has strong experience working with developmentally disabled adults and creating individualized recreational plans to assist them with community integration.

plans to assist them with community integration.
